title: TN 10th Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TN 10th Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: TN 10th Result 2026 out for Class 10 SSLC exam on the official website - tnresults.nic.in on 20-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Tamil Nadu 10th result 2026.

content.text: The Directorate of Government Examinations, Tamil Nadu has officially released the TN 10th Result 2026 for SSLC (Class 10) students for the 2025-26 academic session on its official result portal. The Tamil Nadu SSLC Class 10 public exam results have been made available online for all registered students in government, aided and private schools across the state.

TN 10th Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - tnresults.nic.in. Students can check and download their TN SSLC result by entering their registration number and date of birth in the login window provided on the result page. After downloading the online marksheet, students are advised to carefully verify their name, roll number, subjects, marks and result status, and contact their school or DGE Tamil Nadu immediately in case of any discrepancy.

Tamil Nadu board has published the SSLC Class 10 results for the 2025-26 academic year in online mode on tnresults.nic.in. Students can access their TN 10th public exam marks using their registration number and date of birth and download the provisional marksheet for reference until the original mark statements are issued by the board.

The board has activated the TN 10th Result 2026 direct link on its official result portal for all SSLC candidates. Students can instantly view and download their Tamil Nadu SSLC Class 10 marksheet online by using the direct link given below and entering their registration number and date of birth in the login page.

links.label: TN 10th Result 2026 - SSLC Examination Results April 2026

sections.heading: How to Check TN 10th Result 2026 Online

content.text: Students can follow the steps given below to check and download the Tamil Nadu SSLC Class 10 result 2026 in online mode.

items: Visit the official Tamil Nadu result website - tnresults.nic.in in any browser.
On the homepage, click on the link that says "SSLC Examination Results 2026" or "TN 10th Result 2026".
A new login page will open where you need to enter your Registration Number and Date of Birth in the specified format.
After entering the details correctly, click on the "Submit" or "Get Marks" button to proceed.
Your TN SSLC 10th Result 2026 marksheet will be displayed on the screen with subject-wise marks and result status.
Carefully check all the details and download the provisional marksheet in PDF format for future reference.
Take a printout of the online result copy until you receive the original marksheet and certificate from your school.

structured_links.label: TN 10th Result 2026 - SSLC Examination Results April 2026

seo_tags: how to check TN 10th result online
